data.title: Eugene: Already long on Bitcoin and some small-cap altcoins
data.description: Trader Eugene Ng Ah Sio posted on his personal channel that he has gone long on Bitcoin and some small-cap altcoins. With almost everyone on holiday, even the big sharks are watching and not biting, and the price (of Bitcoin) hasn't been able to break below $84,000. Trading volume across the market has completely collapsed, and sellers are quite exhausted. A few large buyers entering the market can easily tear apart the thin order book. "The upside potential for going long below $90,000 is quite good, with clear stop-loss levels. I'd rather test the waters here now than wait until $95,000 or even $100,000 and then hesitate and be at a loss. Also, January is historically a very volatile month, and I'm betting that this volatility will return in some form as December ends."

data.title: The People's Bank of China (PBOC) released a new version of the "Business Rules for the Cross-border RMB Payment System," which includes the Digital Currency Research Institute within the scope of the notification.
data.description: The People's Bank of China recently issued the "Business Rules for the Cross-border Interbank Payment System" (Yinfa [2025] No. 248), which will take effect on February 1, 2026, replacing the 2018 version. The notice explicitly lists the "Digital Currency Research Institute" as one of the entities covered, alongside the China Development Bank, commercial banks, and the China National Clearing Center. The new rules clarify the operational architecture and business processing procedures of the Cross-border Interbank Payment System (CIPS), stipulating that CIPS should support hybrid settlement models, including real-time gross settlement and timed net settlement, and be able to support "RMB payments, RMB-foreign currency simultaneous settlement (PvP), delivery versus payment (DvP) settlement, central counterparty clearing, and other cross-border RMB transaction settlement businesses."

data.title: Bitcoin: What Happened to Price the Last Time Gold Topped Out?
data.description:
Market history often reveals its most important signals at turning points, not during trends. One of those moments appears when gold reaches a cycle peak, a phase that has previously coincided with major shifts in Bitcoin’s trajectory.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/bitcoin-what-happened-to-price-the-last-time-gold-topped-out/

data.title: MSCI Proposal May Impact Companies with Significant Digital Asset Holdings
data.description:
According to ChainCatcher, MSCI has proposed excluding companies with digital assets comprising 50% or more of their total assets from its global investable market indices. The final decision is expected on January 15, 2026, with changes potentially taking effect in February.

Analysts predict this move could compel 39 publicly traded companies to sell between $10 billion and $15 billion in crypto assets to maintain eligibility. These companies have a combined market capitalization of approximately $113 billion, with Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy) accounting for 74.5% of the affected value.

JPMorgan estimates that Strategy alone might face $2.8 billion in outflows from MSCI-related funds. To avoid exclusion, some companies may proactively reduce their crypto holdings below 50%, potentially triggering market sell-offs and increased Bitcoin volatility. Over 1,268 individuals have signed a petition opposing the proposal, criticizing it for unfairly targeting digital assets.

data.title: XRP Price Holds Key Area as Macro Triangle Tightens: What’s Next?
data.description:
XRP is trading in a narrow and tense range as multiple timeframes point to compression rather than trend resolution. The latest charts highlight a market that is not breaking down, but also not yet confirming upside momentum. Instead, price action suggests preparation, with volatility building beneath the surface
source: https://www.ethnews.com/xrp-price-holds-key-area-as-macro-triangle-tightens-whats-next/

data.title: Gold Expected to Rise as Dow-Gold Ratio Reaches Key Turning Point
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Christopher Aaron, chief analyst and founder of iGold Advisor, has identified a significant fourth turning point in the Dow-Gold ratio. This signal suggests that gold is poised for several years of sustained growth, while holders of industrial stocks like the Dow Jones and S&P 500 may face prolonged losses.

The Dow-Gold ratio measures the number of ounces of gold required to purchase one share of each of the 30 Dow Jones component stocks. Historically, during the previous three key turning points (1930–1933, 1968–1980, 2002–2011), the Dow has fallen by an average of 90.5% relative to gold over 9.3 years.

Aaron also noted that this fourth turning point in the Dow-Gold ratio could be the most critical trend break in their historical performance, with the Dow's decline relative to gold potentially exceeding the average of the previous three cycles.

data.title: Binance will be conducting an Alpha airdrop today at 21:00, with a minimum spend of 240 points.
data.description: Binance will conduct a Binance Alpha airdrop at 21:00 today. Users with at least 240 Binance Alpha Credits can claim tokens on a first-come, first-served basis until the airdrop pool is completely distributed or the airdrop event ends.

data.title: Federal Reserve Rescinds 2023 Crypto Restrictions for Banks
data.description:
The Federal Reserve rescinded 2023 restrictions, letting uninsured state banks seek approval for novel crypto activities previously barred.
source: https://catenaa.com/markets/cryptocurrencies/federal-reserve-rescinds-2023-crypto-restrictions-for-banks/

data.title: BitMart lists Beefy (BIFI)
data.description: According to the official announcement, BitMart will list Beefy (BIFI) on December 26th at 17:00 (UTC+8), with the BIFI/USDT trading pair available. Beefy.Finance is a yield farming optimizer on the Binance Smart Chain. BIFI is the platform's native governance token, used for creating proposals and voting, as well as earning BIFI token rewards through staking.

data.title: Trust Wallet Confirms $7 Million Impact, Ensures User Refunds
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Trust Wallet has confirmed that approximately $7 million has been affected, and the team is committed to ensuring that all impacted users receive refunds. Supporting affected users is the team's top priority, and they are actively working to improve the refund process.

Additionally, the team urges users of the affected browser extension version 2.68 to follow these steps promptly:

Step 1: Do not open the Trust Wallet browser extension version 2.68 on desktop devices to ensure wallet security and prevent further issues.

Step 2: Open the Chrome extension panel in the Chrome browser by copying the following into the address bar (shortcut for the official Trust Wallet browser extension): chrome://extensions/?id=egjidjbpglichdcondbcbdnbeeppgdph

Step 3: If the switch below Trust Wallet is still in the "on" position, toggle it to "off."

Step 4: Click on "Developer mode" in the upper right corner.

Step 5: Click the "Update" button in the upper left corner.

Step 6: Check the version number: 2.69. This is the latest and secure version.

New findings from blockchain intelligence firm AMLBot reveal a sharp contrast in how the world’s two dominant dollar-pegged stablecoins respond […] The post Tether Froze $3.

data.title: Lighter: Perpetual and Spot Trading ZK Circuits Completes Audit and Officially Open Sources
data.description: The Lighter team announced on the X platform that its perpetual and spot trading zk circuits have completed auditing and are now officially open source. The team has released complete verification code, allowing external independent verification of the authenticity and validity of every order placement, cancellation, and liquidation operation performed by Lighter L2 on Ethereum. Developers can generate ZkLighterVerifier using a build script on GitHub and perform consistency checks against deployed Ethereum contracts.

data.title: Trust Wallet: We are refining our refund process to ensure that all affected users receive a refund.
data.description: Trust Wallet released an update on the browser extension (v2.68) incident on the X platform, stating that approximately $7 million in funds have been confirmed to be affected. They will ensure all affected users receive a refund, are actively working to improve the refund process, and will provide instructions on subsequent steps as soon as possible. They also cautioned users not to interact with any messages sent from unofficial channels.

data.title: Significant Ethereum Transfer from Powerstake.eth to Anonymous Address
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, data from Arkham indicates that at 16:30, a total of 2,000 ETH was transferred from the address powerstake.eth to an anonymous address beginning with 0xb123. The value of this transaction is approximately $5.92 million.

data.title: Meteora: DAMM V2 now features transaction fee calculation based on market capitalization.
data.description: Meteora announced on its X platform that DAMM V2 has launched market capitalization-based transaction fees. This feature will allow transaction fees to gradually decrease as projects grow, supporting long-term sustainability and deterring snipers. Meteora added that creators, deployers, and launchers on the platform can now define custom fee curves based on market capitalization to support every stage of the token's lifecycle.

data.title: Former Alameda CEO Caroline Ellison Set for Release in January 2026
data.description:
Former Alameda co-CEO Caroline Ellison is set for release on Jan. 21, 2026, about 10 months earlier than her full sentence.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/former-alameda-ceo-caroline-ellison-set-for-release-in-january-2026/

data.title: Opinion: The strong rebound in BTC market share has caused altcoins to suffer losses; as long as BTC remains the "safest" asset, the altcoin season will not arrive.
data.description: Crypto data analyst CyrilXBT wrote on the X platform that BTC.D (BTC market share) has rebounded strongly from its support level, which is the reason for the sluggish performance of the altcoin market. As long as BTC market share remains high, altcoins will continue to bleed money. Currently, every BTC pullback leads to funds continuing to flow into BTC rather than altcoins. The altcoin season will only begin when BTC is no longer the safest trading instrument, and it is not yet approaching.

data.title: The LAB team transferred 3.506 million tokens, worth approximately $400,000, from their wallet to a centralized exchange.
data.description: According to Arkham's monitoring, the LAB team wallet transferred 3.506 million tokens, worth approximately $400,000, to two cryptocurrency exchanges, Gate and Bitget, 50 minutes ago, which appears to be a sale transaction. The wallet currently holds 61.309 million LAB tokens.
